query:
SELECT
            date_trunc('second',
                created_at - (
                    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at)::bigint % $4
                ) * INTERVAL '1 second'
            )                    AS "bucket!: chrono::NaiveDateTime",
            AVG(value)::float8   AS "value!: f64"
        FROM readings
        WHERE
            sensor_id  = $1
            AND created_at >= $2
            AND created_at <= $3
        GROUP BY 1
        ORDER BY 1
